name: Caprone — The Great Ram
description: Circle 2 Boss (Lust). Towering seductive goat demon prince, beautiful and terrifying.

textToImageTask.prompt: A towering bipedal humanoid goat demon prince in A-pose, tall and powerfully elegant muscular build, lustrous deep crimson fur groomed to perfection, magnificent crown of golden spiral horns inlaid with rubies, wielding a long barbed whip coiled in one hand and a golden scepter in the other, wearing ornate gold and crimson royal armor with exposed chest showing ritual scarification, digitigrade goat legs with golden hoof guards, mesmerizing swirling crimson and gold eyes, 2.8 meters tall, stylized dark fantasy game boss character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Towering elegant bipedal goat demon prince, crimson fur, golden spiral horns with rubies, barbed whip, golden scepter, ornate armor, 2.8m, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Lustrous deep crimson fur, polished gold armor plates, ruby-inlaid golden horns, barbed dark whip leather, ritual scar patterns on chest, swirling crimson-gold eyes
